title: Book Appointment
doctorSelect.title: Choose Your Practitioner
doctorSelect.description: Who would you like to book with?
doctorSelect.unavailableHint: Choose another doctor or try again from {returnDate}.
insurance.title: Choose Insurance
treatment.title: Choose Treatment
treatment.description: What type of appointment do you need?
date.title: Choose Date
date.noSlots: Unfortunately, no appointments are available this month.
time.title: Choose Time
time.noSlots: Unfortunately, no appointments are available for this day.
contact.title: Contact Details & Confirmation
contact.consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for appointment scheduling in accordance with GDPR Art. 6/9.
contact.contactHint: Please provide email or phone (at least one).
contact.contactHint.phoneRequired: Phone number is required. Email is optional but needed for confirmations and reminders.
contact.cancellationHint: Cancellation is possible up to 24 hours before the appointment via the link in your confirmation email.
contact.cancellationHintNoEmail: Cancellation is possible up to 24 hours before the appointment. Please contact the practice by phone.
success.title: Appointment Successfully Booked!
success.subtitle: We have sent a confirmation to {email}.
success.subtitleNoEmail: Your appointment is confirmed. Please note the details.
success.reminder: Reminder: You will receive an email reminder 24 hours and 6 hours before your appointment.
success.reminderNoEmail: Note: Since no email was provided, you will not receive email reminders.
validation.name.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters long
validation.name.invalid: Please enter a valid name (only letters, spaces, hyphens)
validation.email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone.tooShort: Phone number must be at least 6 characters long
validation.phone.tooLong: Phone number must not exceed 20 characters
validation.phone.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number (only digits, +, -, parentheses)
rateLimit.error: You have already booked multiple appointments. Please contact the practice by phone.
cancel.title: Cancel Appointment
cancel.success: Your appointment has been successfully cancelled.
cancel.error: Error cancelling the appointment. Please contact the practice.
cancel.deadline: Cancellation is only possible up to 24 hours before the appointment.
cancel.alreadyCancelled: This appointment has already been cancelled.
cancel.invalidToken: Invalid cancellation link. Please check the link in your email.
cancel.pastAppointment: This appointment is in the past and can no longer be cancelled.
mfaTreatment.title: Choose Service
mfaTreatment.description: Which practice service do you need?
mfaCalendar.title: Choose Appointment
mfaCalendar.noSlots: Unfortunately, no appointments are available for this day.
choice.title: Welcome
choice.bookingDesc: Book an appointment with a doctor or for a practice service
prescription.title: Order Prescription
prescription.selectType: What would you like to order?
prescription.hintRezept: Prescriptions are delivered electronically to your health insurance card. Pick up at your pharmacy without visiting the practice.
prescription.hintHeilmittel: Can be prescribed once per quarter
prescription.quarterlyDesc: Have you already visited our practice this quarter?
prescription.quarterlyYes: Yes, I have already visited this quarter
prescription.quarterlyNo: No, I have not visited this quarter yet
prescription.quarterlyWarning: To pre-order a prescription, you must have visited our practice in person this quarter. Please schedule an appointment first.
prescription.successText: Your order is being processed. We will contact you by phone if needed.
